title.en: Train Workforce Members on Causes of Unintentional Data Exposure

prose.en: Train workforce members to be aware of causes for unintentional data exposure. Example topics include mis-delivery of sensitive data, losing a portable end-user device, or publishing data to unintended audiences.
Workforce members are trained to be aware of causes for unintentional data exposure.

example.en: Example topics include mis-delivery of sensitive data, losing a portable end-user device, or publishing data to unintended audiences.
